/opt/ST/STM32CubeCLT_1.21.0/GNU-tools-for-STM32/bin/arm-none-eabi-g++  -mcpu=cortex-m3  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -fno-threadsafe-statics -O0 -g3 -mcpu=cortex-m3  -T "/Users/polymer/Dev/stm-cpp-test/STM32F103XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=stm-cpp-test.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage
